products.name: Aqua Peacock Winter Kandora
products.description: Limited Edition product discription:A trendsetting hue that blends elegance with confident energy, crafted for those who refuse to blend in. Tailored from premium winter fabric, this kandora delivers warmth, flawless drape, and a standout presence. Step into the season in style and let every occasion vibe with your confidence.

products.name: Kids’ Kandura | Classic Emirati Design
products.description:
Kids Kandura: A Blend of Tradition and Style
Telal presents a premium Kids Kandura designed exclusively for boys who deserve nothing but the best. Featuring a classic cut and high-quality fabric, this kandura ensures comfort and durability while reflecting the richness of Arabic heritage. Whether for festive gatherings or family outings, this outfit guarantees a refined and polished appearance.


The Kandura is a symbol of Arabic Tradition and Telal adds a touch of class to it. Whenever your little gentlemen need to be at the center of attention, they demand a level of quality none less than the best. Telal presents a special line of products for the boys.

*Please note, the egal,shimagh and sandal in the image is not included in the purchase*

products.name: Arabic Modest Dress Abaya
products.description: Discover the latest collection of Arabic modest dress abayas. Our selection features a variety of styles and designs to suit your fashion needs. Shop now and find the perfect abaya to elevate your wardrobe.

products.name: AGAR OUDH STICKS
products.description: Experience a peaceful and refreshing atmosphere with our premium quality agarbatti, specially crafted to fill your home with a divine and soothing aroma. Made from carefully selected natural ingredients, these incense sticks create a calming environment perfect for prayer, meditation, yoga, and relaxation.

products.name: Turkish Cap
products.description: This exquisitely constructed kufi combines creativity and artistry. The precise topstitching on the top and sides is done in alternate directions, and they come together in such a pleasing way that it almost resembles a piece of art. The fabric has a subtle sheen and is made of premium cotton, giving it a contemporary, clean appearance. The same premium cotton that was used to make the exterior portion is also used to line the interior.
